productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Graffiti Black Flip Flops
description: adidas created these Graffiti men flip flops for the carefree college-goer. Themes of texting, young love and caricatures abound galore in this printed Flip Flops. Pair them with a tee and your favourite slept-in style denims. Upper Thick fabric striped thong straps Fabric toe separator for maximum comfort with branding on the axis of the Flip Flops Rubber footbed with print for all-day massage feel Outsole TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum traction shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not machine wash
